mapper.select:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(oi.unit_price), 0) AS totalRevenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) AS totalOrders, COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) AS totalTickets, COALESCE(SUM((pov.base_price - oi.unit_price) * oi.quantity), 0) AS Revenue
FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN order_item_options oio ON oi.id = oio.order_item_id JOIN product_option_values pov ON oio.option_value_id = pov.id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE p.partner_id = #{partnerId}::uuid AND o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.paid_at >= #{startDate} AND o.paid_at < #{endDate} + INTERVAL '1 day'

SELECT DATE(o.paid_at) AS date, COALESCE(SUM(oi.total_price), 0) AS revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE p.partner_id = #{partnerId}::uuid AND o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.paid_at >= #{startDate} AND o.paid_at < #{endDate} + INTERVAL '1 day'
GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT c.name AS category, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_price), 0) AS revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id JOIN menu_categories c ON c.id = p.category_id
WHERE p.partner_id = #{partnerId}::uuid AND o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.paid_at >= #{startDate} AND o.paid_at < #{endDate} + INTERVAL '1 day'
GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY revenue DESC

SELECT p.id AS productId, p.code AS productCode, p.name AS productName, COALESCE(SUM(oi.total_price), 0) AS revenue, COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) AS tickets FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE p.partner_id = #{partnerId}::uuid AND o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.paid_at >= #{startDate} AND o.paid_at < #{endDate} + INTERVAL '1 day'
GROUP BY p.id, p.code, p.name
ORDER BY tickets DESC LIMIT 3
